name: Zoho Sign eSignature API
what_it_does: Electronic signature platform within the Zoho ecosystem with REST API — enabling businesses to send documents for e-signature, create templates, track signing status, and automate document workflows, with ESIGN/UETA compliance, OAuth2 authentication, and tight integration with other Zoho products (Zoho CRM, Zoho Books, Zoho Creator).
use_cases: Sending documents for e-signature via Zoho Sign API for automated contract workflows
Integrating e-signature into Zoho CRM via Zoho Sign API for sales contract automation
Creating document templates via Zoho Sign API for standardized agreement management
Tracking signing completion via Zoho Sign webhooks for contract lifecycle management
Building e-signature into custom apps via Zoho Sign API with embedded signing
not_for: Teams not using Zoho ecosystem (Zoho Sign's main value is Zoho suite integration)
Enterprise CLM with complex approval workflows (use DocuSign CLM for complex CLM)
EU QES requirements (verify Zoho Sign's current eIDAS compliance level)
best_when: A business already using Zoho CRM, Zoho Books, or other Zoho products needs integrated e-signature without adopting a new vendor — Zoho Sign integrates natively across the Zoho ecosystem.
avoid_when: You're not in the Zoho ecosystem, need enterprise CLM, or require EU QES compliance.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow via Zoho Accounts (accounts.zoho.com). Client ID + Client Secret for app registration. Scopes: ZohoSign.documents.ALL, ZohoSign.templates.READ, etc. Bearer token in Authorization: Zoho-oauthtoken header (not standard 'Bearer'). Regional endpoints: .com, .eu, .in, .com.au, .jp. Refresh token support. Zoho developer console for app registration. Webhook subscriptions for document events.

pricing.paid_tiers: Standard $10/month; Professional $20/month; Enterprise $30/month (per org, not per user)
pricing.notes: Zoho Corporation (India/Chennai). Founded 1996. Bootstrapped. $1B+ revenue. 80M+ users across all Zoho products. Privacy-focused: no data monetization. 50+ Zoho apps (CRM, Books, Creator, Desk, etc.). Zoho Sign: tightly integrated with Zoho suite. ESIGN/UETA compliant. GDPR compliant. Indian company with global operations. Data center options: US, EU, India, Australia, Japan. Per-organization pricing (not per-user) makes it cost-effective for larger teams. API included on all paid plans.

performance.rate_limits: Not publicly documented for Zoho Sign; Zoho API general: 2,000-25,000 calls/day

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OAuth2 via Zoho Accounts. Non-standard header (Zoho-oauthtoken). Regional endpoints (.com, .eu, .in, .au, .jp). Indian company (privacy-focused). Per-org pricing. Free plan (5 docs/month). Webhooks.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Document reads idempotent by document ID. Template reads idempotent. Sending not idempotent. Webhook events: implement idempotent handlers.
known_agent_gotchas: Regional endpoints: api.zoho.com (US), api.zoho.eu (EU), api.zoho.in (India) — choose correct region
Zoho OAuth: get token from accounts.zoho.com — separate from API endpoint region
OAuth scope naming: ZohoSign.documents.ALL (not generic scopes) — check Zoho Sign scope list
Zoho ecosystem value: use if already on Zoho CRM/Books/Creator — otherwise limited advantage
Per-org pricing ($10-30/month) — affordable for larger teams vs per-user pricing

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth2 with scopes. ESIGN/UETA legal compliance. GDPR compliant. SOC2 certified. Indian company — privacy-focused, no data monetization. Multiple data center regions. Signed documents are legally binding records. Non-standard auth header (Zoho-oauthtoken) is minor inconsistency. Regional data residency options.
